name: tiktok-carousel
title: TikTok / Social Video Carousel
description: Mobile-first horizontal snap-scroll carousel of 9:16 video cards with peach-gradient backdrop, TikTok logo overlay, engagement stats, creator handles, and external link CTAs. Dot pagination at bottom. Works generically for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
